summary: Full-stack testing of Dhairya Shah portfolio complete. Backend: 10/10 pytest cases pass (health, status, contact create+list+ordering, 422 validations, optional subject). Frontend: home loads with no console/page errors, hero shows name/US location/CTAs, all navbar links present, smooth scroll works, contact form success + validation flows both display correct toasts and clear inputs, resume PDF returns 200 application/pdf. email_sent=false confirmed and treated as expected per agent note.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py send_contact_email() interpolates user-supplied name/subject/message directly into HTML with no escaping — low risk since not rendered in a browser context, but consider html.escape() for safety before enabling Resend.

GET /api/contact returns up to 500 items with no pagination and no auth; anyone can list all contact submissions. Acceptable for a personal portfolio but flag for privacy — consider adding a simple admin key/basic-auth guard on GET /api/contact.
Contact.created_at is stored as an ISO string (not BSON date). Sort works today because ISO-8601 UTC strings sort lexicographically, but a datetime field would be more robust.
seed_data_creation: Test contacts prefixed with 'TEST' were created via /api/contact during pytest run (persisted in MongoDB test_database.contacts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all /api/contact flows plus /api/status regression. Frontend Playwright script above validates hero, navbar, contact form (both empty-validation and happy-path) and resume PDF headers. Contact.jsx uses sonner toasts (data-sonner-toast + data-type='success'|'error'). email_sent=false is expected because EMERGENT_EMAIL_KEY is empty.
